name: Shahi Paneer Royale
description: Fresh cottage cheese in a rich, cashew-nut tomato gravy with aromatic spices.

name: Dal Baati Churma
description: The quintessential Rajasthani trio: spicy dal, wood-fired baatis, and sweet churma.

name: Ghee Roast Masala Dosa
description: Crispy golden dosa roasted in pure A2 ghee, served with 3 types of chutneys and sambar.

name: Truffle Chilli Paneer
description: Wok-tossed paneer cubes with bell peppers, finished with a hint of truffle oil.

name: Gatte Ki Sabzi
description: Gram flour dumplings simmered in a tangy, spiced yogurt-based gravy.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Black lentils slow-cooked overnight with cream and butter for a silky texture.
